card.name: Planar Genesis
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may put a land card from among them onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't, put a card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Biological Conquest
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards. Put up to one land card discarded this way onto the battlefield tapped under your control.

card.name: Reformation in the Aether
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you controlled it, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Recall from the Afterlife
card.text: Return up to two target creature and/or planeswalker cards from your graveyard to your hand. Create two 1/1 black Demon creature tokens.

card.name: Lightning Helix
card.text: Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Planar Conduit
card.text: When Planar Conduit enters, draw a card. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Conjured Cityback
card.text: Whenever Conjured Cityback attacks, you may balance {4}. If you do, create a tapped and attacking 0/0 colorless Army creature token and put three +1/+1 counters on it. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.)

card.name: Ponderous Wealdlord
card.text: Vigilance, reach Wurms you control have vigilance and reach. When Ponderous Wealdlord enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Amber Field Battalion
card.text: Amber Field Battalion enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Reach When Amber Field Battalion leaves the battlefield, you may put its counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Left Eye of the Tomb-Star
card.text: Left Eye of the Tomb-Star enters tapped. Flying As long as Left Eye of the Tomb-Star is in your graveyard, planeswalkers you control have "[-3]: Return target card named Left Eye of the Tomb-Star from your graveyard to the battlefield."

card.name: Blacksail Privateer Fleet
card.text: Blacksail Privateer Fleet enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a counter from an Army or planeswalker you control: Draw a card. Activate only if you attacked this turn and only once each turn.

card.name: Eloaios Breaks the Line
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Untap all creatures you control. They get +2/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn. If you're in a renaissance and it's your combat phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase.

card.name: Godforge
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a permanent: Add two mana in any combination of colors. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {10}, {T}: Create a 5/5 red Giant creature token. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card type among cards in your graveyards.

card.name: Horizon-Spanning Hydra
card.text: Trample Horizon-Spanning Hydra enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When Horizon-Spanning Hydra enters, search your library for up to X basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Supply Ships
card.text: Flying Supply Ships enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move a counter from target permanent you control to another target permanent you control.

card.name: First Blade of the Aevyr
Interspatial Infestation
card.text: When you cast this spell during your main phase, copy it. All non-Wurm creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. Create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Wurm-Court Herald
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever you cast a spell, you may have another target permanent you control phase out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until your next turn.)

card.name: Scuttling Crematoria
card.text: Scuttling Crematoria enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each Army you control and a loyalty counter on each planeswalker you control.

card.name: Theurge of the Last Stand
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) {1}{R}: Double Theurge of the Last Stand's power until end of turn. Activate only once each turn unless you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Thunderhead Axon
card.text: Reach At the beginning of your second main phase, untap target permanent. At the beginning of your end step, untap target permanent.

card.name: Scholar of House Sophia
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Flying Scholar of House Sophia gets +1/+1 as long as you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Abracine Artillery
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Abracine Artillery deals 2 damage to target attacking creature, blocking creature, or planeswalker. If you're in a renaissance, it deals 10 damage to that permanent instead.

card.name: Peng-Lai Guardian
card.text: Peng-Lai Guardian can't attack unless you control a Wurm. When Peng-Lai Guardian enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: The Gjallarpits Revolt
card.text: When The Gjallarpits Revolt enters, draw a card. Whenever you draw a card, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice The Gjallarpits Revolt.

card.name: Interplanar Tunneling
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Metaphysical Incisor
card.text: Activated abilities you activate cost {X} less to activate, where X is Metaphysical Incisor's power. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Cloud-Gilled Vacuolus
card.text: Flying Balance {3}{U}: Put a +1/+1 counter on Cloud- Gilled Vacuolus. Activate only as a sorcery and only once. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.)

card.name: Greatclub of the Bonesmith
Spear of the First Soldier
Desperate Lich-Aspirant
card.text: When Desperate Lich-Aspirant dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it. Swampcycling {RG} ({RG}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Open the Sky
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle. • Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Chains of Life and Death
card.text: Put a defender counter on target creature. Put a decayed counter on target creature. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Metamorphic Pit-Thresher
card.text: When Metamorphic Pit-Thresher enters or dies, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Wormhole Weaver
card.text: When Wormhole Weaver enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") Whenever Wormhole Weaver deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: House Abrisyne Intercedes
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Create a 3/1 white Demigod creature token. {2}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Pilgrimage to House Sophia
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Draw a card. {2}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Anointment of House Ariouth
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Target creature gets +3/+2 until end of turn. {2}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Centigonite
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Menace When Centigonite exploits a creature, target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Titanic Ferrosteum
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {3}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Trample, reach Trample over planeswalkers (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the controller of the planeswalker it's attacking.)

card.name: Thrice-Exulted Typhon
card.text: Vigilance, haste, ward {2} {2}: Thrice-Exulted Typhon gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of nonmana abilities you've activated this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Firmament Burner
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Discard a land card: Draw a card. Unless you're in a renaissance, activate this ability only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Martyr-to-Be
card.text: Haste When Martyr-to-Be dies, if it's your turn, create a 3/1 white Demigod creature token. {2}{R}, Sacrifice Martyr-to-Be: Creatures you control gain haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Aggluminex
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Aggluminex exploits a creature, destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Marrow-Burnished Lattice
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Flying, vigilance When Marrow-Burnished Lattice exploits a creature, put three +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Recall the Dead Glories
card.text: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Draw a card.

card.name: Hemolytica Respository
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Menace When Hemolytica Respository exploits a creature, return target instant, sorcery, or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Calculating Battlemage
card.text: Flying Calculating Battlemage gets +1/+1 for each nonland permanent you control.

card.name: Towering Ideologue
card.text: When Towering Ideologue enters, create a 3/1 white Demigod creature token and a 2/2 white Angel creature token with flying and vigilance. Basic landcycling {1}{W} ({1}{W}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Sepulcher-Oracle
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Sepulcher-Oracle exploits a creature, destroy target nonland permanent you don't control with mana value X or less, where X is the exploited creature's power.

card.name: Song of the Dheimweil
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a nonland permanent card from your graveyard. Target nonland permanent becomes a copy of the exiled card. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Eternity Breach
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or remove two loyalty counters from a planeswalker you control. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Master of a Dying Art
card.text: Whenever Master of a Dying Art attacks, exile up to one other target nontoken, nonland permanent. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Engorged Thaumaphage
card.text: Flying When Engorged Thaumaphage leaves the battlefield, if it wasn't blocking, draw two cards. Basic landcycling {1}{U} ({1}{U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Mistpath Anomaly
card.text: When Mistpath Anomaly enters, search your library for a up to three basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Basic landcycling {1}{G} ({1}{G}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Sunmaker Specialist
card.text: When Sunmaker Specialist enters, return target instant, sorcery, or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand. Basic landcycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Enthralling Sparkseeker
card.text: Sacrifice another creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Enthralling Sparkseeker and draw a card. Activate only once each turn. Basic landcycling {1}{B} ({1}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Failed Cartographer
card.text: When Failed Cartographer enters, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice Failed Cartographer: Create two tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature tokens with trample.

card.name: Scribe of the Last Chapter
card.text: Flying If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed are created instead.

card.name: Glyph of Allegiance
card.text: Glyph of Allegiance enters tapped. As it enters, choose three different colors. {T}: Add one mana of each of the chosen colors. This mana can't be spent to pay generic mana costs.

card.name: Dimensional Digestion
card.text: Enchant creature When Dimensional Digestion enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") Enchanted creature gets -1/-1. If you control a Wurm, enchanted creature gets -4/-4 instead.

card.name: Instability Extractor
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. When Instability Extractor enters, create two Rupture tokens. (They're artifacts with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Ferrocene Fiend-Hunter
card.text: When Ferrocene Fiend-Hunter enters, target opponent creates a 1/1 black Demon creature token. When Ferrocene Fiend-Hunter leaves the battlefield, if it's your turn, destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Crest of the Winged Dawn
Send into the Wurmways
card.text: Shuffle target artifact or enchantment into its owner's library. Its controller creates a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Blood Sun Disciple
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Piety Extractor
card.text: Deathtouch {3}{B}: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Summary Execution
card.text: Destroy target permanent if it attacked, blocked, or was the source of a nonmana activated ability this turn.

card.name: Sword of the Mass Grave
Decisive Ambush
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control. Counter all activated and triggered abilities of the creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Grand Delusion
card.text: Grand Delusion can't block. When Grand Delusion is dealt damage by a source you don't control or becomes the target of a spell or ability you don't control, exile it. If you do, draw five cards.

card.name: The First Splitting-Tool
card.text: Husk (When this enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Equipped creature has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it deals damage to that player equal to the number of nonbasic lands they control." Equip—{2}, Pay life equal to the number of nonbasic lands you control.

card.name: Aegis of House Abrisyne
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Aegis of House Abrisyne can't attack or block unless you're in a renaissance. {4}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ruin-Thresh Flagellum
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Menace, lifelink When Ruin-Thresh Flagellum exploits a creature, you draw X cards and you lose X life, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Malediction Engine
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Flying, first strike When Malediction Engine exploits a creature, it deals X damage divided as you choose among any number of targets, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Biomass Tributary
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Biomass Tributary exploits a creature, put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is the exploited creature's power.

card.name: Ledger-Keeper Prince
card.text: Lifelink {B}, Pay 2 life: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Sword of the Nameless
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it. It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and loses all abilities. Equip {0}. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Scheming Waytwister
card.text: When Scheming Waytwister enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") Whenever a Wurm you control enters, you may sacrifice Scheming Waytwister. If you do, search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Unverified Personal Gnosis
card.text: Create a 0/1 red and blue Mystic creature token with haste and "This creature gets +1/+0 for each card you've drawn this turn." Draw a card.

card.name: Second Day Legionnaires
card.text: Menace, haste {W}{U}{R}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn. Second Day Legionnaires gets +2/+0 as long as there is a card exiled with it.

card.name: Machine-Augur
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Prowess When Machine-Augur exploits a creature, create an artifact token named Optimization with "Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast."

card.name: Diplomatic Resolution
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target noncreature, nonland permanent. • Draw a card. Put a loyalty counter on each planeswalker you control.

card.name: Unbroken Procession
card.text: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. Exile Unbroken Procession. You may cast it from exile during your next turn.

card.name: Eloaios' Orbitar
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) {T}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. If you're in a renaissance and it's your turn, that creature also gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: The First Day
card.text: Starting with the next opponent in turn order, each player may sacrifice all lands they control. If that player doesn't, destroy all nonland permanents that player controls.

card.name: Global Positioning System
card.text: When Global Positioning System enters, search your library for up to three basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Planar Oversight
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle. • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Leyline Behemoth
card.text: Reach Whenever Leyline Behemoth becomes the target of a spell or ability, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a land card, put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put it into your hand. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Ariouth's Stratagem
card.text: Choose two. You may choose the same mode more than once. • Create a 1/1 white Demigod Knight creature token with double strike. • Create a red enchantment token named Oriflamme with "Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0." • Destroy target artifact you don't control.

card.name: Crown's Sycophants
card.text: Crown's Sycophants enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever a planeswalker you control enters or dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Protean Phantasm
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it X times. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.) As long as Protean Phantasm is a token, it can't block. Sacrifice a token: Protean Phantasm gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Administrator's Tower
card.text: When Administrator's Tower enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {T}, Sacrifice Administrator's Tower: You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Winds of the Worldsoul
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {3}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Polymorphic Enforcer
card.text: Whenever Polymorphic Enforcer deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card. Discard a card: Polymorphic Enforcer gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Reconfiguration Agent
card.text: When Reconfiguration Agent enters, create a 2/1 black Thrull creature token. You lose 1 life.

card.name: Crater-Pocked Battlescape
card.text: Crater-Pocked Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Crawling Pandemonium
card.text: Trample Crawling Pandemonium gets +1/+1 for each card type among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Consign to Irrelevance
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell.

card.name: Spaceroot Superorganism
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Vigilance, reach, trample When Spaceroot Superorganism exploits a creature, you gain 6 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Battleshaper Archmage
card.text: Flying When Battleshaper Archmage enters, you may discard a land card. If you do, draw a card, then repeat this process.

card.name: Mystic Token WLG
card.text: Haste This creature gets +1/+0 for each card you've drawn this turn.

card.name: Rupture WLG
card.text: {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.

card.name: Wurm Token WLG
card.text: Trample

card.name: Might of the Elements
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {X}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn. Then it fights up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Copper Web Axonite
card.text: When Copper Web Axonite leaves the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Startwister Conglomerate
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Trample When Startwister Conglomerate exploits a creature, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Metaira Victorious
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Vigilance As long as you're in a renaissance and it's your turn, Metaira Victorious has indestructible.

card.name: The Stars Are Going Out
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one. At the beginning of that turn's upkeep, you may balance {7}. If you don't, you lose the game. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Exile The Stars Are Going Out.

card.name: Envoys of the Optimizer
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a tapped permanent. Whenever you attack, create a5/5 red Giant creature token that's tapped and attacking. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Hydrologer Hermit
card.text: When Hydrologer Hermit enters, surveil 2. {G}{W}{U}: Exile Hydrologer Hermit, then return it to the battlefield. Activate only if Hydrologer Hermit is tapped.

card.name: Stardust Acephalon
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Stardust Acephalon exploits a creature, creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: Parasite Star
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Parasite Star enters, you lose 2 life. All other permanents have exploit and "When this permanent enters, you lose 2 life." Whenever a permanent exploits a creature, its controller draws a card.

card.name: Horizon-Cutter Technique
card.text: Destroy target creature and/or target planeswalker with total mana value 5 or less.

card.name: Cryptic Looking-Glass
card.text: When Cryptic Looking-Glass enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") You may look at the top card of your library any time. As long as you control a Wurm, you may cast spells and play lands from the top of your library.

card.name: Korinnos' Abandoned
card.text: Korinnos' Abandoned enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When Korinnos' Abandoned enters, each opponent discards a card. For each land card discarded this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Korinnos' Abandoned.

card.name: Peer Past the Veil
card.text: Discard your hand. Then draw X cards, where X is the number of card types among cards in your graveyard.

card.name: A House that Wasn't There
card.text: [+1]: Add {C}. (This isn't a mana ability.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control seven or more lands with different names, you may have A House that Wasn't There become a legendary land planeswalker named Skrekr, Predatory District. He gains "[-2]: Create a 2/2 black Spider Horror creature token." (He becomes attackable.)

card.name: Sandstorm Spindleback
card.text: Double strike When Sandstorm Spindleback enters, you gain 1 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Bowerbrush Malevolence
card.text: Flash Bowerbrush Malevolence enters tapped. {B}{G}{U}: Untap Bowerbrush Malevolence and put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: World Recycler
card.text: When World Recycler enters or leaves the battlefield, look at the top card of your library. You may exile it. {2}, Sacrifice World Recycler: Exile target noncreature, nonland permanent.

card.name: Mass-Energy Converter
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Mass-Energy Converter exploits a creature, it deals X damage to any target, where X is that creature's power.

card.name: Wurmblood Brewery
card.text: When Wurmblood Brewery enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") When Wurmblood Brewery leaves the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of target token you control.

card.name: Twisting Empty Space
card.text: Create a 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample. Draw a card. You may cast this card from your graveyard as long as it's an end step and you control a Wurm.

card.name: Beholding the Impossible
card.text: Return target spell to its owner's hand, then that player reveals their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it with mana value less than or equal to the returned spell's mana value. If you do, exile the chosen card.

card.name: Benevolent Tutelars
card.text: Artifact, enchantment, and planeswalker spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Loyalty abilities you activate cost [+1] more to activate.

card.name: Fallen-Crown Adherent
card.text: Lifelink {2}, {T}: Tap target creature. At the beginning of your end step, if a permanent you controlled left the battlefield this turn, untap Fallen-Crown Adherent.

card.name: Jiva's Masterwork
card.text: Balance {5}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control exactly five lands and have exactly five cards each in your hand and graveyard, you win the game.

card.name: Planeswalking
card.text: Up to one target land you control becomes the basic land type of your choice. (It loses its other types and abilities. This effect lasts indefinitely.) Draw a card.

card.name: Abracine Chariot
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) As long as you're in a renaissance and it's your turn, Abracine Chariot is an artifact creature. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Supermassive Starspear
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Flying When Supermassive Starspear exploits a creature, it deals 7 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Lost in the Wurmways
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of differently named tokens you control. The owner of target nonland permanent puts it into their library second from the top or on the bottom.

card.name: Nectar-Weeping-Liar
card.text: Flash Vigilance {1}{U}: Nectar-Weeping-Liar gets +3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Quickening
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. The next creature spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash.

card.name: Transcendent Superiority
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +1/+1 gains hexproof until end of turn. Untap it. • Until end of turn, target Follower gains hexproof and "You may activate this planeswalker's loyalty abilities any time you could cast an instant."

card.name: Tectonic Signal
card.text: Draw two cards. Then, discard a card unless you balance {2}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.)

card.name: Spiral System Scavenger
card.text: Flash Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Spiral System Scavenger exploits a creature, search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Administrator's Attendant
card.text: {T}: Choose one. Activate only as a sorcery. • Untap target non-Cephalid permanent. • You may activate the loyalty abilities of target planeswalker you control an additional time this turn.

card.name: Planeswalker's Spite
card.text: When Planeswalker's Spite enters, until your next turn, all creatures get -1/-1. Whenever you activate an ability of a planeswalker you control, if it has no loyalty counters on it (after paying loyalty costs), copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Planeswalker's Perspective
card.text: When Planeswalker's Perspective enters, draw three cards. Planeswalkers you control have "[-X]: You may cast a spell with mana value X from your hand without paying its mana cost."

card.name: Planeswalker's Dominion
card.text: When Planeswalker's Dominion enters, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {1}: Put a loyalty counter on each planeswalker you control. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Planeswalker's Immortality
card.text: When Planeswalker's Immortality enters, exile all creatures until Planeswalker's Immortality leaves the battlefield. Planeswalkers you control aren't put into their owners' graveyards for having 0 loyalty.

card.name: Planeswalker's Power
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, until end of turn, up to one target planeswalker you control becomes a 4/4 Avatar creature with trample, haste, and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, put that many loyalty counters on this creature."

card.name: Derylexes' Fury WLG
card.text: Menace

card.name: Fallow-Frost
card.text: Flash When Fallow-Frost dies, choose one — • Target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn. • Remove a counter from target permanent you don't control.

card.name: Chittering Colonist
card.text: When Chittering Colonist dies, create a tapped 2/1 black Thrull creature token. {B}{R}{G}, Sacrifice Chittering Colonist: Create a tapped 2/1 black Thrull creature token.

card.name: Army of One
card.text: Army of One enters tapped. {R}{W}{B}: Army of One gains double strike until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Einos Struggles to Awaken
card.text: Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control, target land you control, and target noncreature, nonland permanent you control. They each become 0/0 Avatar creatures. (They lose their other types. You can't cast this spell without legal choices for all its targets.)

card.name: Vinelayer Titan
card.text: When Vinelayer Titan leaves the battlefield, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {6}, Exile Vinelayer Titan from your hand or graveyard: Create two tapped 3/3 colorless Elemental artifact creature tokens.

card.name: World-Circling Coil
card.text: Flying When World-Circling Coil leaves the battlefield, if it's your turn, you may search your library for a card named World-Circling Coil, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Guardian of the Rusted Core
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you pay an additional {WU} to cast it. As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {5}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.)

card.name: Collapsing Hyperionoid
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Persist (When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.) Double strike, trample When Collapsing Hyperionoid exploits a creature, you lose 2 life and draw two cards.

card.name: Banner of the Dark King
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +3/+2. At the beginning of your end step, if Banner of the Dark King isn't attached to a creature, exile it, then return it to the battlefield. Equip {2}

card.name: Threefold Form Technique
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature or planeswalker you control, except it isn't legendary and it has haste and "Whenever you activate an ability of this permanent, copy it twice. You may choose new targets for the copies." Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Exhausted Morale
card.text: This spell costs {2} more to cast if it targets a permanent that entered this turn. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Abracine Ambrosia
card.text: When Abracine Ambrosia enters and when you sacrifice it, search your library for a planeswalker card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Abracine Ambrosia: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Desperate Oracle
card.text: Flying When Desperate Oracle enters, draw two cards. Islandcycling {GW} ({GW}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Overgrown Battlescape
card.text: Overgrown Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Practiced Talent
card.text: Copy up to one target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. (Mana abilities can't be copied.) Draw a card.

card.name: Wriggling Precursor
card.text: Flash When Wriggling Precursor enters, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") Wurm creatures you control get +1/+1 for each land you control.

card.name: Night of the Wild Hunt
card.text: Creatures you don't control have decayed. (They can't block. When one attacks, its controller sacrifices it at end of combat.) Creatures you control lose decayed and can't have or gain decayed. At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice Night of the Wild Hunt.

card.name: Madness Devil
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Madness Devil deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Unraveled Cycle-Keeper
card.text: Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink When Unraveled Cycle-Keeper enters, you may search your library for an Equipment card with mana value 4 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Organic Replication
card.text: Create a tapped token that's a copy of target land or token you control.

card.name: Intangible Invidia
card.text: Affinity for noncreature, nonland permanents (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature, nonland permanent you control.) Flying Hexproof from abilities

card.name: Unity Proclamation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {X}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Create two 0/0 colorless Army creature tokens. Put X +1/+1 counters on each of them.

card.name: Jiva's Voice
card.text: When you cast this spell, create a green and white enchantment token named Anthem of the Worldsoul with "Creatures you control get +1/+1." Jiva's Voice can't be blocked.

card.name: Oriflamme WLG
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.
card.reverse-related: Ild, The First Flint and Steel

card.name: Sealed into the Scriptures
card.text: Enchant nonland permanent Enchanted permanent is an Equipment artifact with equip {2}, "Equipped creature gets +2/+0," and "Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, you may return this Equipment to its owner's hand." It loses all other abilities.

card.name: Sound and Fury
card.text: Choose one — • Sound and Fury deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. • Gain control of target creature or planeswalker until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ild, The First Flint and Steel
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Whenever equipped creature attacks, create a red enchantment token named Oriflamme with "Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0." Exile that token when Ild leaves the battlefield. Equip—{BR}, Discard a card.

card.name: Historical Impact
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter or a loyalty counter on target creature or planeswalker you control. Then it fights up to one target creature or planeswalker you don't control. (Planeswalkers fight with loyalty.)

card.name: Emptying Streets
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. Its controller sacrifices a token.

card.name: Rusted Memory
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact. Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Profiteers' Market-Fleet
card.text: Profiteers' Market-Fleet enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. {T}, Remove X counters from among Armies and planeswalkers you control: Add X mana of any one color.

card.name: Infinite Rage
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. If the discarded card wasn't a land card, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Hammer of the Ironstorm
Abracine Hubris
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Whenever you cast a spell from your hand, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play it, and you may play it without paying its mana cost if you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Battlefield Boneworker
card.text: Trample Whenever a creature you control dies, for each Equipment that was attached to it, create a token that's a copy of that Equipment. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Heralded Sword-Arbiter
card.text: When Heralded Sword-Arbiter enters, create three 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens with decayed. (A creature with decayed can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Equipment you control have "Equip Zombie—Pay 1 life."

card.name: Scythe of the Remembrance
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has flying, deathtouch, and lifelink. Equip—Sacrifice a creature.

card.name: Twin Blades of the Raven
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it. (Copies of permanent spells become tokens.) Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {1}

card.name: Infested Emissary
card.text: When Infested Emissary enters, you may discard a card. If you do, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.") Infested Emissary gets +2/+2 and has vigilance and trample as long as you control a Wurm. {T}, Tap an untapped permanent you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Euryschelas Labor Station
card.text: Exploit (When this land enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) {T}: Add {B}. You lose 1 life unless you control a Mountain and a Forest. When Euryschelas Labor Station exploits a creature, you lose 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Divine Palace
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) {T}: Add {R}. You lose 1 life unless you control a Plains and an Island. {3}{R}: Until end of turn, Divine Palace becomes a 5/3 God creature with "As long as it's your turn and you're in a renaissance, Divine Palace has flying." It's still a land.

card.name: Reverse the Tides
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {3} three times. (While paying each balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Shuffle your hand and graveyard into your library, then draw seven cards. Exile Reverse the Tides.

card.name: Winding Weald
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. You lose 1 life unless you control an Island and a Swamp. When Winding Weald enters, if you control five or more other lands, create a Rupture token. (It's an artifact with "{6}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.")

card.name: Prime Meridian
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. You lose 1 life unless you control a Forest and a Plains. Balance {3}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Prime Meridian: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.)

card.name: Barracks of the Worthy
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. You lose 1 life unless you control a Swamp and a Mountain. {3}, {T}: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Ancient Dominion
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}, {R}, or {W}.) Ancient Dominion enters tapped.

card.name: Primal Dominion
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {R}, or {G}.) Primal Dominion enters tapped.

card.name: Stalwart Dominion
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.) Stalwart Dominion enters tapped.

card.name: Verdant Dominion
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}.) Verdant Dominion enters tapped.

card.name: Desolate Dominion
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}, {W}, or {B}.) Desolate Dominion enters tapped.

card.name: Cosmic Battlescape
card.text: Cosmic Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Hectic Battlescape
card.text: Hectic Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Sky-Devouring Swarm
Desperate Conservator
card.text: When Desperate Conservator enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand. Forestcycling {UB} ({UB}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Desperate Socialite
card.text: When Desperate Socialite enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Desperate Socialite leaves the battlefield. Plainscycling {BR} ({BR}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Desperate Contractors
card.text: Trample, haste Trample over planeswalkers Mountaincycling {WU} ({WU}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Frozen Battlescape
card.text: Frozen Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Advanced Battlescape
card.text: Advanced Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Midnight Battlescape
card.text: Midnight Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Urban Battlescape
card.text: Urban Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Vast Battlescape
card.text: Vast Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Corrupted Battlescape
card.text: Corrupted Battlescape enters tapped unless you've attacked this game. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Entrenched Siegemasters
card.text: Entrenched Siegemasters enters with four +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever Entrenched Siegemasters or another creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it has power greater than its base power, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Mastery over Death
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature or planeswalker you control gains "When this permanent dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control." If you cast this spell during your main phase, you lose 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Ynvar's Abandoned
card.text: Haste As long as there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, Ynvar's Abandoned has flying. {2}{R}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Destruction Order
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) Destruction Order deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you're in a renaissance, it deals 2 damage to that permanent's controller.

card.name: Peng-Lai Reshaper
card.text: Deathtouch {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Dream into Existence
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard. Return up to two target permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Dream into Existence.

card.name: Battlefield Rations
card.text: When Battlefield Rations enters and when you sacrifice it, for each kind of counter on target permanent, put another counter of that kind on it or remove one from it. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Battlefield Rations: You gain 3 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Artificer's Artillery
card.text: Artificer's Artillery enters with four +1/+1 counters on it. When Artificer's Artillery enters, you may remove four counters from among Armies and planeswalkers you control. If you do, it deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Celestial Defense
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, balance {4}. (While paying a balance cost, you may return a permanent you control to its owner's hand. It pays for {X}, where X is its mana value.) Return up to two target nonland permanents to their owner's hands.

card.name: Shadowy Reinforcements
card.text: Flash Shadowy Reinforcements enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. Remove a counter from an Army or planeswalker you control: Counter target noncreature spell or activated ability unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Light-in-the-Darkness
card.text: Vigilance Creatures you control must be blocked if able. Whenever you activate a nonmana ability, untap up to one target creature you don't control.

card.name: Shortsword of the Great Fool
card.text: Husk (When this Equipment enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed and attach this to it.) Whenever equipped creature attacks and isn't blocked, draw a card. Equip—{1}, Discard a card.

card.name: Jiva's Careful Watch
card.text: Whenever Jiva's Careful Watch or another nontoken permanent you control leaves the battlefield, create a 3/3 colorless Elemental artifact creature token.

card.name: Instrument of Eternity
card.text: Instrument of Eternity enters with X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the number of activated abilities among permanents you control. {10}: Double the number of each kind of counter on target permanent.

card.name: Landscape Flattener
card.text: Vigilance, trample When Landscape Flattener leaves the battlefield, create a green and white enchantment token named Collective Blessing with "Creatures you control get +3/+3."

card.name: Seed of the Twisting
card.text: Seed of the Twisting's abilities cost {2} less to activate for each Wurm you control. {T}: You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. {4}, {T}: Draw a card. {6}, {T}: Create a tapped 4/4 green Wurm creature token with trample.

card.name: Giver of False Mercy
card.text: Flying, lifelink Creatures you control with base power 2 or less get +1/+1 and have deathtouch.

card.name: Butcher of Abraxas
card.text: Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) Trample When Butcher of Abraxas exploits a creature, create four 1/1 black Demon creature tokens.

card.name: Something Waiting in the Dust
card.text: Non-Eldrazi permanents lose all abilities and have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: Eloaios' Nursery
card.text: Golden age (If you cast an instant or sorcery spell, activated a nonmana ability, and attacked this turn, enter a renaissance for this game.) {2}, {T}: Draw a card. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you're in a renaissance.

card.name: Deepglow Skate
card.text: When Deepglow Skate enters, double the number of each kind of counter on any number of target permanents.

card.name: Rules of Engagement
card.text: Whenever a creature, land, or planeswalker dies during its controller's turn, exile it. At the beginning of your second main phase, return each card exiled with Rules of Engagement to its owner's hand.

card.name: Zombie Token WLG
card.text: Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)
card.reverse-related: Ild, The First Flint and Steel

card.name: Angel Token WLG
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Eternal Prosperity WLG
card.text: If you would put one or more counters on a permanent or player, put twice that many of each of those kinds of counters on that permanent or player instead.

card.name: Beast Token WLG
card.text: This token is all colors.

card.name: Avatar Token WLG
card.text: Flying

card.name: Energy Auto-Optimizer WLG
card.text: Sacrifice a permanent: Add {B}{R}{G}.

card.name: Feather of Hyrja WLG
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {1}

card.name: Anthem of the Worldsoul WLG
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Demigod Knight Token WLG
card.text: Double strike

card.name: Crownspear WLG
card.text: Equipped creature gets +X/+X and has flying. Equip {1}

card.name: In a Renaissance WLG
card.text: "If a war does come to pass, the only ethical use of our position of power is to end it as swiftly as possible." —Abrisyne, to Ariouth and Sophia

card.name: Succulent Lies WLG
card.text: Menace This token has all activated abilities of each creature card in your graveyard.
